name: Carlos Martinez
bio: Adventure tourism guide certified by SECTUR, born and raised in the municipality of Cardonal, Hidalgo. With over 8 years leading excursions through the Tolantongo Canyon, hiking trails of the Sierra Gorda, and the Hnähnü communities in the region. Specialist in rappelling, grotto exploration, and sustainable tourism. He has walked every trail, explored every grotto, and knows the water temperature of every pool in every season of the year.
